item.title: LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 75954 Harry Potter Hogwarts Great Hall Castle Toy Gift Idea for Wizarding World Fan Building Set for Kids here: ℹ️: This castles toy for kids 4-level tower features movable Grand Staircase spiral steps at its base, potions room, treasure room with chest Also includes Professor Quirrell with dual Lord Voldemort face, Hagrid, Nearly Headless Nick, buildable Basilisk plus Hedwig & Scabbers figures This Hogwarts Castles Great Hall toy is a great birthday or Christmas Harry Potter Gift for kids who love the Wizarding World adventures!
